title: pelargonium × cuneiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × cuneiflorum, also known as the rose-scented geranium, is a type of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Pelargonium × cuneiflorum include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and stress, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its numerous health benefits.
